latin: Puella nova in scholam venit. regina gregis eam inspexit et dixit: 'die Mercurii roseum vestimentum gerimus. haec est lex.'

questions.prompt: What must be worn on Wednesdays?

translation: A new girl came to the school. The queen of the group inspected her and said: 'On Wednesdays we wear pink. This is the rule.'
